_comment: Base config for MWIR→LWIR diffusion synthesis. Tune for your GPU memory.

_tuning_notes.heterogeneity: Increase lambda_cfc (0.1→0.3) if LWIR still looks blurry on homogeneous scenes
_tuning_notes.artifacts: Reduce lr to 5e-5 or add more dropout if you see checkerboard patterns
_tuning_notes.speed: Set num_res_blocks=1, base_channels=64 for fast experimentation
_tuning_notes.memory: Reduce batch_size or image_size; use gradient_checkpointing=true (add to Trainer)
_tuning_notes.large_images: Use patch inference at test time with overlap=0.25
